title: RFA Reacts to EPA Announcement on Year-Round E15
content: The Renewable Fuels Association (RFA) expressed gratitude for the Midwest governors' efforts to create a year-round E15 market and supported the EPA's decision to maintain the April 28, 2025, implementation date. RFA also emphasized the need for a nationwide legislative solution to allow year-round E15, citing Ohio's withdrawal of its petition as a sign of urgency.
author: Analysts Account
